description_long: This object is a QNAP network-attached storage (NAS) device, designed for data storage and sharing in home or office environments. The front panel features two vertically aligned drive bays with rectangular handles for easy access, as well as a series of LED indicators and physical buttons for power and status monitoring. The left side of the front panel also includes a USB port for quick data transfer. The rear panel is equipped with a large cooling fan, multiple USB ports, an Ethernet port, and a power input, all set within a metallic plate for heat dissipation. The top and side panels are plain and unadorned, constructed from a smooth, light gray plastic. This device is compact and boxy, with a robust build suitable for placement on desks or shelves in urban settings.
description: A compact QNAP NAS device with dual drive bays, front LED indicators, and rear cooling fan and ports, finished in light gray plastic.
description_view_0: Front view showing two drive bays, LED indicators, power button, and a USB port.
description_view_1: Plain top panel with a smooth, unmarked light gray surface.
description_view_2: Rear view featuring a large cooling fan, multiple USB ports, Ethernet port, and power input.
description_view_3: Plain bottom panel, similar to the top, with no visible features.
